title: Air Conditioner Structure Description - Evaporator Sensor

blocks.text: Air Conditioner Structure Description - Evaporator Sensor

A thermistor-type temperature sensor attached to the back of the evaporator, which utilizes the characteristics of a lower resistance value at higher temperatures and a higher resistance value at lower temperatures. Also, by inserting directly into the fins, the evaporator temperature can be accurately detected. The PGM-FI ECU or auto A/C control unit reads the change in resistance value as the evaporator temperature changes and stops the compressor before the evaporator freezes.
